channel.title: Blog on Hasan Ata Arslan
channel.description: Recent content in Blog on Hasan Ata Arslan

item.title: Another update
item.description:
This is another example article. Each article lives in its own Markdown file, which keeps writing separate from the design of the website.

Publishing a new post

Create a new file in content/blog, add a title, date, and description at the top, then write the article below it. The blog list will automatically show the newest posts first.

item.title: My first article
item.description:
This is the first post in my blog. I will use this space to document the work I do, the questions I explore, and the lessons I learn along the way.

What I want to share

Some posts will be short progress notes; others may be deeper write-ups of a project, a competition, or a topic I am studying. The goal is to make the process as useful as the final result.
